title: lastrea vilis
intro: Lastrea vilis, also known as the Maidenhair Fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea vilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support liver function. Herbal preparations of Lastrea vilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
